instruction: The arrow mark on this activity icon drifted. Put it back exactly where it belongs. (very subtle — only 2px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/activity.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="102,102 114,114 110,106 114,114 106,110" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/activity.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polyline points="22 12 18 12 15 21 9 3 6 12 2 12"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,100 112,112 108,104 112,112 104,108" />
</svg>
